message:
bench: add SlidingWindow rate-monitoring Criterion benchmarks

4 bench functions for the time-bucketed sliding window counter:
- record_same_bucket: 10K events hitting one bucket (no rotation)
- record_advancing: 5K events with per-bucket time advance (rotation)
- count_query: 10K count() queries on populated window
- snapshot: full window state capture
Each varies across 10/60/300 bucket configurations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -490,6 +490,10 @@ harness = false
 name = "content_dedup_ops"
 harness = false
 
+[[bench]]
+name = "sliding_window_ops"
+harness = false
+
 [[test]]
 name = "proptest_daemon"
 path = "tests/proptest_daemon.rs"
